global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on promoting the NovaPay service.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup process for NovaPay.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo with the text 'NovaPay' prominently displayed in a dark font against a light background.

elements.label: Secure & simple text
elements.description: A clear, large font text stating 'Secure & simple' in white, positioned centrally on a blue background.

elements.label: Fast signup text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body text that reads 'Fast signup, instant card' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Claim reward' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in light blue tones that create a visually appealing background without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Additional background element
elements.description: A subtle circular shape in the background that adds depth to the overall design.

elements.label: Additional background element
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the background that complements the overall layout.

elements.label: Additional background element
elements.description: Another abstract shape that enhances the visual interest of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element positioned towards the bottom of the ad, adding a touch of design.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape at the bottom of the ad that serves as a visual anchor.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'NovaPay' is bold and stands out at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: Text that describes the service, emphasizing its security and simplicity.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: A call-to-action text that encourages users to engage with the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, NovaPay, secure signup
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NovaPay, Secure simple Fast signup instant card, Claim reward
